profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Brigit Biofarmaka Technologi Tbk provides manufacturing services for herbal medicine, herbal honey, skincare, cosmetics, botanical tea, and functional powdered drinks in Indonesia. It also offers hair care products, including shampoo, conditioner, hair mask, hair tonic, hair oil, and hair serum and powder, as well as body moisturizer, body cleanser, facial cleanser, moisturizer, essence and serum, face mask, and personal care products. In addition, it provides lip gloss, cushion, foundation, eyeliner, and blush on balm. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Sukoharjo, Indonesia.
